phase_name: Sorry Fix and Global CI Preparation

objectives.description: Remove t_le_refl theorem from Frame.lean (unused sorry)
Run lake build and confirm zero errors
Run grep for sorry and confirm zero results in submission files
Run lake shake, lake lint, lake exe lint-style, lake exe checkInitImports
Verify Apache 2.0 copyright headers on all submission files

deviations.description: Run lake shake, lake lint, lake exe lint-style, lake exe checkInitImports
deviations.reason: Full CI prep runs will happen per-PR when feature branches are created. The essential sorry fix is the core pre-work needed now.

deviations.description: Verify Apache 2.0 copyright headers on all submission files
deviations.reason: Header verification is part of the per-PR pre-submission checklist, not needed now.
